overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 115 条，入选 18 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 115 previously displayed items excluded, and 18 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: Hands Free, AIs Forward: NVIDIA XR AI Brings Agents to AR Glasses
items.summary_zh: 重点：NVIDIA XR AI is now available in public beta, giving developers a framework for building multimodal AI agents for AR glasses and XR devices.
items.summary_en: Focus: NVIDIA XR AI is now available in public beta, giving developers a framework for building multimodal AI agents for AR glasses and XR devices.

items.title: Coherent Breaks Ground on Expanded Texas Facility, Scaling AI’s Optical Backbone

items.summary_en: Focus: AI runs at the speed of light. More and more, that light is made in Texas. Coherent broke ground today on an expanded manufacturing building in Sherman, Texas. items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.summary_zh: 重点：OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
items.summary_en: Focus: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

items.title: Unlocking UK house-building with AI-accelerated planning
items.summary_zh: 重点：UK government partners with Google DeepMind to build a new AI-powered prototype aimed at faster housing decisions.
items.summary_en: Focus: UK government partners with Google DeepMind to build a new AI-powered prototype aimed at faster housing decisions.

items.title: Ada Palmer – Machiavelli is the most misunderstood thinker of all time

items.summary_en: Focus: "He begged to work for the regime that tortured him."

items.title: Vercel Sandbox can now run for up to 24 hours
items.summary_zh: 重点：Vercel Sandboxes can run uninterrupted sessions for up to 24 hours (up from 5 hours). This new max duration unlocks workloads that require longer runtimes, such as large-scale data processing, end-to-end testing pipelines, and long-lived agentic workflows.
items.summary_en: Focus: Vercel Sandboxes can run uninterrupted sessions for up to 24 hours (up from 5 hours). This new max duration unlocks workloads that require longer runtimes, such as large-scale data processing, end-to-end testing pipelines, and long-lived agentic workflows. items.summary_en: Focus: GLM 5.2 is now available on AI Gateway . items.title: Increased Blob store limit for Hobby users
items.summary_zh: 重点：Hobby users can now create up to 100 Blob stores, up from 5. This gives teams more flexibility to organize data by project, environment, or region as applications grow. Storage, operations, and transfer limits still apply. Learn more in the Blob documentati
items.summary_en: Focus: Hobby users can now create up to 100 Blob stores, up from 5. This gives teams more flexibility to organize data by project, environment, or region as applications grow. Storage, operations, and transfer limits still apply. Learn more in the Blob documentation .

items.title: Workflow SDK now runs natively in Nitro v3
items.summary_zh: 重点：Workflow SDK 's native Nitro v3 integration is now in beta. Steps run inside the same bundled runtime as the rest of your app, instead of a separate bundle. Nitro's useStorage() and other server-side APIs work directly inside "use step" functions. The Nitro
items.summary_en: Focus: Workflow SDK 's native Nitro v3 integration is now in beta. Steps run inside the same bundled runtime as the rest of your app, instead of a separate bundle. Nitro's useStorage() and other server-side APIs work directly inside "use step" functions. The Nitro dev server also serves the workflow

items.title: Extending Human Intelligence Through AI
items.summary_zh: 重点：Understanding AI as an extension of human intelligence—not a replacement for it—offers a more grounded path for building trustworthy AI systems. The post Extending Human Intelligence Through AI appeared first on Microsoft Research .
items.summary_en: Focus: Understanding AI as an extension of human intelligence—not a replacement for it—offers a more grounded path for building trustworthy AI systems. The post Extending Human Intelligence Through AI appeared first on Microsoft Research .

items.summary_en: Focus: mimalloc is an open-source, modern, scalable memory allocator that is a drop-in replacement for malloc and free.
